reviews.comment:
Para cargar muy bueno ...ahora si queres tomar un café en el Full..olvidate. Tenes que estacionar a ocho cuadras. Y los lugares para estacionar ahi estan siemprw con conos reservados no se para quién. Una lástima.

(Translated by Google)
It's great for charging... but if you want to grab a coffee at the Full, forget it. You have to park eight blocks away. And the parking spots there are always reserved with cones for who knows who. What a shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNuXzRqbXhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Espantoso trato, me retire porque el seguridad Securitas me dijo "mamita", un espanto la forma de dirigirse y a los gritos. Totalmente innecesario, le indique ubicarse por lo menos 3 veces

(Translated by Google)
Horrible treatment. I left because the Securitas security guard called me "Mommy." The way he addressed me and shouted was horrible. Totally unnecessary. I told him to move at least three times.
